home.title: Secretary Botanic
home.subtitle: Your plant care agent
home.no_watering: No pending watering. Enjoy your garden.
home.scan_desc: Identify species with AI and add to your garden.
home.where_are_plants_desc: Useful when there is a wind or hail alert.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Customize your experience.
profile.agent_settings_desc: Set the tone of the agent's chat responses.
profile.advice_desc: Proactive notifies you before frosts, watering, or strong winds.
profile.weather_location_desc: Customize local alerts for your garden.

agent.title: Agent
agent.subtitle: Ask about weather, watering, and care.
agent.greeting: Hello, how can I help you?
agent.greeting_desc: I check the weather, care for your garden, search for products, and diagnose problems from a photo.
agent.sugg_1_prompt: Should I water today based on the weather in my city?
agent.sugg_2_prompt: Summarize the status of my plants and what needs attention.
agent.sugg_3_prompt: I'm going to attach a photo of a leaf with spots — tell me what's wrong and how to fix it.
agent.sugg_4_prompt: Search for fertilizer options for pothos on Mercado Libre.
agent.sugg_5: Is there an alert this week?
agent.sugg_5_prompt: Is there a risk of hail, frost, or strong winds this week?
agent.sugg_6_prompt: How do I care for an indoor succulent during the winter?
agent.photo_ready: Photo ready to send to agent.
agent.input_placeholder_photo: Tell me what you see or leave blank...

scan.title: Scan
scan.instruction: Upload or take a photo of your plant to identify it.
